hero.desc: Strengthening civil society in partnership with 40+ NGOs in Fergana and Tashkent regions — 2025–2027.

items.title: Mapping and Analysis
items.desc: In-depth study and analysis of the needs of 40 women's NGOs.

items.title: Partnership Network
items.desc: Creating a powerful platform for experience sharing and collaboration.

items.title: Capacity Building
items.desc: Practical training on leadership and strategic planning.

items.title: Advocacy
items.desc: Promoting gender equality and social initiatives at the national level.

items.title: Practical Toolkit
items.desc: Preparation and distribution of strategic guides and reference materials.

items.title: Sustainable Development
items.desc: Elevating and strengthening local initiatives to the national level.

reels.title: Project
reels.subtitle: Short video reports in Instagram format
reels.label: YouTube Shorts

impact.label: Impact Metrics
impact.desc: The project is reaching the end of Phase 3 (Milestone 3). We have united 40 organizations that are now driving social change in their regions.
impact.quote: This project not only provides us with the necessary knowledge and skills but also helps build a strong community through mutual support.

footer.org: Developing civil society in Uzbekistan with the support of the UN Democracy Fund (UNDEF).
footer.ctaDesc: Join our project and be part of the change.

modal.name: Your Name
modal.sentDesc: We will get back to you shortly.

items.title: Outcome 1: Needs and Network
items.heading: Strengthening Capacity
activities: Creating a network of 40 NGOs in Tashkent and Fergana.
Developing a strategic plan for capacity building.
Identifying advocacy directions through a network round table.

items.title: Outcome 2: Knowledge and Mentorship
items.heading: Enhancing Knowledge and Skills
activities: Training on Leadership, Fundraising, and Project Writing.
Specialized training programs for NGOs and initiative groups.
Developing joint partnership projects between organizations.

items.title: II Round Table (May 2026)
items.heading: Presentation of Results
activities: Presentation of project results and achievements.
Analysis of network activities and discussion of challenges.
Defining paths for future sustainability and development.

items.title: Outcome 3: Sustainability and Engagement
items.heading: Sustainable Partnership and Advocacy
activities: Implementing small pilot initiatives at the local level.
Joint advocacy events at regional and network levels.
Expanding the network through regular meetings.
Presentation of final results and future plans.

project_team.member_quote: We actively cooperate for the development of society and social stability.

partners.nnt: «QALB NURI» CENTER FOR SOCIAL AND LEGAL SUPPORT OF WOMEN AND FAMILIES
partners.name: TO’XTASINOVA DAMIRA ISMAILOVNA
partners.address: Fergana region, Fergana city, Quruvchilar street, 4
partners.mission: Providing socio-legal services in the fields of achieving gender equality, preventing gender violence, strengthening the family institution, raising the future generation as harmoniously developed individuals, and increasing the socio-political activity of women.

partners.name: DAVRONOVA O’G’ILOY ABDUVAHOBOVNA
partners.mission: Providing socio-legal support for women and teenagers, assisting them in social, economic, legal, cultural-educational, ecological, and spiritual spheres, as well as promoting a healthy lifestyle.

partners.name: O’RINBOYEVA HILOLA AVAZOVNA
partners.mission: Uniting forces to protect and support the interests of entrepreneurs, women, and youth in line with the reforms implemented in Uzbekistan, ensuring their active participation, and facilitating the development of their economic and spiritual-educational skills.

partners.name: KARIMOVA XALIMA O’LMASOVNA
partners.mission: Facilitating the adaptation and integration of children with disabilities into a healthy society; supporting the legal, social, and economic interests of young women raising children with disabilities.

partners.name: NAZAROVA XADICHA ABDULLAYEVNA
partners.mission: Promoting a healthy lifestyle among mothers, children, women, and teenagers in the Fergana region, changing individual attitudes toward personal health, and forming a new ecological worldview to help stabilize the environmental situation.

partners.name: TURG’UNOVA NODIRA ALISHEROVNA
partners.mission: Supporting and developing women in various fields, ensuring equal opportunities and access to education, healthcare, economic resources, and active participation in social life.

partners.name: ISAKOVA NILUFAR AHMADQULOVNA
partners.mission: Supporting sustainable ecological development in Uzbekistan and Central Asia by reducing negative environmental impacts, developing ecological consciousness, promoting healthy lifestyles, and implementing nature conservation initiatives.

partners.nnt: ASSOCIATION OF WOMEN IN THE AGRARIAN SECTOR
partners.name: TESHABOYEVA MUHTARAMA ARIFJONOVNA
partners.mission: Empowering rural women through the development of climate-resilient agriculture, providing them with economic advantages, and enabling them to fully realize their potential.

partners.name: NOSIROVA MAHFUZA ALISHEROVNA
partners.mission: Increasing the legal, cultural, economic, and social knowledge of the youth in the Fergana region, and actively supporting them in building a democratic civil society and participating in the new reforms of the Republic of Uzbekistan.

partners.nnt: CENTER FOR SUPPORT OF CIVIL INITIATIVES
partners.name: HAMIDOVA GULSHAN MAHAMADRASHID QIZI
partners.mission: Promoting social justice and gender equality by implementing sustainable solutions at the education and policy levels, based on adapting international experience to the real needs of the population.

partners.name: SHIKINA ANASTASIYA ALEKSANDROVNA
partners.mission: Our mission is to create and coordinate educational and cultural initiatives that unite youth across the Central Asian region. We strive to form a space for friendship and cooperation through international conferences, tolerance, and peace projects, helping build bridges instead of walls. Our goal is to inspire youth to act together for a more open, peaceful, and sustainable future.

partners.name: UZOQOVA MUHARRAM ABDUBANOBOVNA
partners.mission: Our mission is to provide psychological assistance to women and their children who have been victims of violence.

partners.name: YULDASHEVA NARGIZA ERKINOVNA
partners.mission: 'Craft House' sees its task as preserving national craftsmanship, adapting it to modern requirements, passing it on to future generations, and promoting it on an international scale.

partners.name: ABDUVAHABOVA FOTIMA UKTAMOVNA
partners.mission: Our mission is to preserve nature, reduce negative environmental impacts, and improve the quality of life. We focus on strengthening the role of civil society, developing environmental enlightenment, worldview, and education. Developing and implementing nature protection programs, projects, and events. Teaching children and youth to treat nature with care.

partners.name: ISAKOVA ZEBO MURODOVNA
partners.mission: Our mission is to create a healthy and stable environment for future generations by developing a green economy, ecological education, and sustainable entrepreneurship. It works on expanding economic opportunities for women and youth, strengthening ecological sustainability, and increasing civic engagement in society.

partners.name: MUHAMMADJONOV ISLOMJON MURODJON O’GLI
partners.mission: Our mission is to provide free education to low-income and socially vulnerable youth and women, increasing their literacy in modern professions and foreign languages.

partners.name: MIRZAHMEDOVA SHOHIDAXON AKBAROVNA
partners.mission: Our mission is to ensure family stability in Uzbekistan, reduce conflicts, increase prosperity and stability in families, prepare youth for family life, provide career guidance, and assist in developing entrepreneurial ideas.

partners.name: ABDURAHIMOVA FERUZA BOHADIROVNA
partners.mission: Our mission is to develop leadership skills, activity, and love for science in youth through educational and cultural initiatives. We inspire book reading, form attention and care for the environment, and support those in need by creating an atmosphere of personal growth and social responsibility.

partners.name: HAMIDOVA GULNOZA AKRAMJON QIZI
partners.mission: Our mission is to prepare young specialists for admission to the world's top 100 universities, support them in undergraduate, graduate, and doctoral programs, and provide practical help in writing scientific articles and obtaining state grants to enhance their scientific potential.

partners.name: TOSHTEMIROVA NILUFAR NAZIMOVNA
partners.mission: Our mission is to teach women craftsmanship, develop entrepreneurial skills, and assist in increasing their economic and social potential. We strive to strengthen women's financial independence through our own income, revive national cultural heritage, and contribute to the social stability of society.

partners.name: UBAYDULLAYEVA ZARNIGOR HASANBOY QIZI
partners.mission: Our mission is to increase the social activity of young women, create a creative platform for their professional and scientific development, and establish cooperation through volunteer groups.

partners.name: SHIRIN RASHIDOVA
partners.mission: Developing and supporting initiatives of citizens, especially youth, women, and people with disabilities, including rural populations, in building civil society and promoting democratization through education and training.

partners.name: TILLAYEVA NODIRA DONIYOROVNA
partners.mission: Assisting in protecting the rights of persons with disabilities and their family members, and creating an inclusive society with equal opportunities for all citizens to ensure their comprehensive development.

partners.name: ILMURODOVA OLIYA VLADIMIROVNA
partners.mission: Educating citizens in the spirit of loyalty to the Motherland, helping the younger generation gain deep knowledge, and increasing spiritual, cultural, and legal literacy through social and educational programs.

partners.name: ALIMJANOVA DILBAR MAG’RIBJANOVNA
partners.mission: Promoting social welfare and empowering women, youth, and the elderly through education, media, legal enlightenment, and cooperation between the state and civil society.

partners.name: YOQUBJANOVA SHAHZODA RUSTAMOVNA
partners.mission: Increasing the cultural and legal literacy of the population through social and educational programs. We strive to unite state and civil society efforts for the country's comprehensive development.

partners.name: TESHEBAYEVA AYGUL IRKINBAYEVNA
partners.mission: Improving the quality of life for women and children, protecting their rights, and providing psychological and legal support to foster a healthy social environment and sustainable development.

partners.name: ABIDOVA SHIRIN RAHIMJANOVNA
partners.mission: Encouraging and supporting initiatives in organizing volunteer activities and protecting the rights and interests of volunteers.

partners.name: MAHMUDOVA HILOLA ULUGBEKOVNA
partners.mission: We strive to create an inclusive society free from stigma and discrimination, where every individual has access to treatment, care, and a dignified life.

partners.name: ASILABONU G’ULOMOVA
partners.mission: Our goal is to build an inclusive society where everyone has the opportunity for treatment and care, ensuring a life of dignity for all without discrimination.

partners.name: ASHIROVA VIKTORIYA EDUARDOVNA
partners.mission: Our mission is to increase the quality of life of the elderly by involving them in social activities, supporting a healthy lifestyle, mental health, and meaningful leisure time.

partners.name: QODIROVA DILNOZA
partners.mission: The goal of the 'Oltin Qanot' volunteer team is to support, develop, and assist in implementing volunteer activities in Uzbekistan. It aims to improve volunteer work in social, environmental, educational, and cultural fields.

partners.name: ABDULLAEVA KAMILA ULUG'BEKOVNA
partners.mission: Our mission is to create a healthy, sustainable, and harmonious society that encourages personal development and ecological responsibility. We strive to inspire people toward an active lifestyle through educational programs and eco-initiatives.

partners.name: CHERNOSKULOVA YELENA ALEKSEYEVNA
partners.mission: Our mission is to unite women and support them in unlocking their leadership and professional potential. We develop women's entrepreneurship and education for the benefit of society, creating a community that inspires new achievements.

partners.name: TSAY SVETLANA ALEKSANDROVNA
partners.mission: Our mission is to inspire love and pride for our home city through practical actions. Our goal is to unite citizens in a patriotic movement for the cleanliness, beauty, and safety of the city.

partners.name: ABBOS MANSUROV
partners.mission: Our mission is to promote the principles of UN Security Council Resolution 1325 by establishing sustainable peace, developing a culture of dialogue, and encouraging the equal participation of women and youth in decision-making processes.

partners.name: TURSUNOVA DONA MAVLYANOVNA
partners.mission: Our mission is to promote a healthy and active lifestyle, unite Nordic walking enthusiasts, exchange knowledge and experience, and teach effective walking techniques for health improvement.

partners.name: MUHITDINOVA MARG’UBA HOJIAKBAROVNA
partners.mission: Our mission is to help girls find their path in life through the promotion of healthy lifestyles, personal development, and open dialogue with mothers and families within local communities (mahallas).

partners.name: SA'ATBEK MUZAFFAROV
partners.mission: The mission of the Academy of Volunteers is to serve as a non-governmental educational institution focused on training volunteers in Uzbekistan and organizing free lessons through volunteer initiatives.
